name: Enhancement Request
description: Suggest improvements for Openports
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
body:
  - type: markdown
    attributes:
      value: |
        Thanks for suggesting an enhancement!
        
        Please check the [issues](https://github.com/MohamedMohana/openports/issues) first to see if someone else has already suggested it.
        
  - type: checkboxes
    attributes:
      label: Types of enhancements
      description: select the enhancements that would make the biggest impact
      options:
        - "⭐ Feature - Safety ratings, developer intelligence, export capabilities (new features I'd love to see in future versions!)
        - "🚀 Performance - Faster startup, better filtering, keeping it lightweight"
        - "💡 Community - Active engagement and transparency"
        - "📖 Documentation - Comprehensive and up-to-date"
        - "🔒 Security - Clear caveats and security considerations documented
        
        Please review our [Security Policy](https://github.com/MohamedMohana/openports/security) before reporting.
